ItacPersonItem.Notes: Among the Intronati Castelvetro read and commented Petrarch`s Rime, and discussed criticisms to Ariosto`s Orlando furioso. Subsequently, he tried to import the Intronati membership rules to the Academy he created in Modena. See his biography by Marchetti-Patrizi, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
